---
title: "Data Analyst Portfolio"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:test@example.com
---

Welcome to my professional ePortfolio! I am a Data Analyst student passionate about uncovering insights and telling stories through data. 

Please explore my [Projects](projects/index.qmd) to see examples of my work, or view my [CV](cv/cv.pdf) to learn more about my professional background.
